title: 0ryant Ecosystem Evidence Envelope v0
description: Draft shared CloudEvents-style envelope for taudit, tsafe, tencrypt, tedit, and 0ryant-shell. This schema only standardizes the common envelope and shared extension attributes. Repo-local payload stays in data.

id.description: Event identifier unique within the producing system

source.description: Producer identity, typically repo or binary name such as taudit, tsafe, tencrypt, or 0ryant-shell

type.description: Stable event type name such as io.taudit.finding.authority_propagation

subject.description: Operator-facing subject of the event: pipeline path, command target, hostname, or contract name

correlationid.description: Shared correlation key used to join events across repos for a single operator flow

provenanceproducer.description: Binary, command, or subsystem that produced the event

provenanceversion.description: Producer version or schema version, if known

provenancekind.description: High-level class of evidence to support filtering and routing

data.description: Repo-local payload. The common envelope does not constrain internal fields beyond JSON object shape.
